purpose: Quality map: stratify the ONE confirmed edge-aligned entry's REAL-FILLS outcomes by condition (VIX character/level, ribbon spread, level tier, time-of-day, day structure) to say take-full / size-down / skip from data. Propose-only (Rule 9).

highest_signal_proposals.proposal: TAKE FULL-SIZE when tod_bucket=1000-1029 (real-fills exp $81.94, WR 85.7%, N=14).
SIZE DOWN / SKIP when vix_character=falling (real-fills exp $-188.78, WR 27.3%, N=11).

op20_disclosures.authority: Real-fills (simulate_trade_real over OPRA bars) is the WR/expectancy authority. SPY-space grade_observation is a directional proxy only (lessons C1/C3: SPY edge != option edge).
op20_disclosures.realfills_window: OPRA contract cache ends ~2026-05-29 (latest file date SPY260529 in backtest/data/options). The REAL-FILLS window is therefore ~2025-01-02..2026-05-29, NOT the full 16 months through 2026-06-16. Fires after ~05-29 return no OPRA data (counted no_fill). SPY-space strat covers the full window for context.
op20_disclosures.levels: Historically-rebuilt level proxies (active + multi_day from _detect_from_history as-of each day), NOT the production star/Carry named set. level_tier_proxy is a PROXY: multi_day ~ Carry/3star; round_number = within 10c of $X.00; else active_only. Disclosed per OP-20.
op20_disclosures.small_n: Per-bucket n is small; buckets with n < 8 are flagged low_power and must NOT drive a sizing/skip rule alone. Anchor-day fills per bucket are tiny (3 WIN + 3 LOSS anchor days total) so per-bucket edge_capture is directional, not conclusive.
op20_disclosures.as_of: All condition tags (VIX character/level, spread, tier, time, day structure) are computed AS-OF the entry bar — no look-ahead (lessons C6).
op20_disclosures.scope: Stratification of the ONE confirmed edge (bearish_rejection_morning = BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON). NOT a new detector; no production knob changed (Rule 9, propose-only).

confound_checks.note: Separability + concentration checks (lessons C4) for the headline signals, ATM real-fills. Confirms rising-VIX and the 1000-1029 window are INDEPENDENT edges (barely overlap; each survives removing the other), and that no signal is a single-day artifact.

quality_map_synthesis.overall_read: 177 fires (135 ATM real-fills, window ~2025-01..2026-05-19 per OPRA cache). Overall ATM WR 62.2% but exp -$32.75 (total -$4,422): high hit-rate, NEGATIVE expectancy — many small wins, few large losses. The broad bearish_rejection_morning population is NOT a clean win under chart-stop-only; the edge concentrates in specific CONDITIONS. SPY-space proxy is +$5/fire (C1/C3: SPY edge != option edge).
take_full_size: VIX RISING at entry: exp +$53.14, WR 83.3%, N=24, 17 distinct dates. Monotonic ladder falling(-$189) < flat(-$36) < rising(+$53) CONFIRMS the production VIX-rising gate direction.
TIME 10:00-10:29 ET: exp +$81.94, WR 85.7%, N=14, 11 distinct dates. INDEPENDENT of rising-VIX (survives its removal at +$47). Highest single-bucket exp in the map.
ROUND-NUMBER level ($X.00 +/-10c): exp +$19.97, WR 73.3%, N=30, 23 dates. Independent lift (round+flat-VIX +$26 vs nonround+flat -$54).
size_down_marginal: Ribbon spread <30c: exp -$6.82 (near-flat). NOTE inverts the wider=cleaner hypothesis — spread magnitude does NOT predict edge here (all spread buckets ~flat-to-negative except no clear monotonic trend); 80c+ is the bulk at -$29.
Day structure inside-OR (range) -$9 and trend-down(below-OR) -$9: near-flat, not edges.
Confidence LOW exp -$15 (least bad tier); HIGH conf is the WORST (-$83) — the detector's high tier (big body+vol+bear candle) ANTI-correlates with real-fills exp here.
skip: VIX FALLING at entry: exp -$188.78, WR 27.3%, N=11, 8 distinct dates. STRONGEST negative; the clean mirror of the rising-VIX edge. Robust (not single-day).
TIME 10:30-10:55 ET: exp -$41.91, N=99 (the bulk of fires). This window bleeds.
Day structure above-OR (failed/extended rallies): exp -$89, WR 44%, N=18.
highest_signal_to_propose: PROPOSE (Rule 9, NOT applied): keep VIX-rising as a TAKE-FULL tier and treat VIX-FALLING as a SKIP (not just a score demerit) for this setup — the falling bucket is -$189 exp / 27% WR over 8 dates and is the single most actionable negative. This SHARPENS the existing VIX-rising gate rather than adding a new untethered gate.

PROPOSE (Rule 9, NOT applied): a TIME-OF-DAY quality tier — 10:00-10:29 ET fires are the highest-exp pocket (+$82, 86% WR, independent of VIX); 10:30-10:55 bleeds (-$42, N=99). Worth a focused A/B as a sizing tier (full-size 10:00-10:29 / size-down after 10:30).
quality_map_synthesis.caveats: Per-bucket anchor edge_capture is uninformative here: only 1 of J's 6 anchor days produced an ATM OPRA fill in this watcher (the rest either did not trigger THIS specific morning-watcher or fell after the OPRA window). So edge_capture columns are near-zero by construction and NOT a gate in this analysis; the j_edge_tracker (full engine) remains the doctrine gate for any params change. Level tier is a historical PROXY (OP-20). Real-fills end ~2026-05-19; treat post-May-2026 as out-of-sample-unmeasured.
